name: funpack
description: Author deterministic, agent-first games in the funpack language. Skills and agents that teach funpack syntax, the engine.* stdlib, the things/behaviors/pipelines model, and the fixed-point determinism contract, plus the /funpack:new scaffolding command and the bundled funpack-mcp server whose tools build, test, inspect, and query a game.

plugins.name: funpack
plugins.description: Write funpack games: language syntax & semantics, the engine.* API, the things/behaviors/pipelines runtime model, project layout, the asset/level/tilemap/model/UI/audio bake pipelines, and the determinism gates — plus the /funpack:new scaffolding command, the bundled funpack-mcp server whose tools build/check/test/run/inspect/query a game (and search the docs), and author/reviewer agents.
